description: Real Search Engine with Meilisearch factory pattern and docker-compose integration. The search package already has a SearchClient (packages/search/src/services/search-client.ts) wrapping MeiliSearch SDK, plus BM25 in core/. Wave 4 adds: an engines/ directory with MeilisearchEngine class implementing a SearchEngine interface, a factory that returns MeilisearchEngine or InMemoryEngine based on env, wiring to admin/quantmail/quantchat search endpoints, and Meilisearch in docker-compose.
steps: Create packages/search/src/engines/types.ts - define SearchEngine interface with methods: search(index, query, options), indexDocuments(index, docs), removeDocuments(index, ids), createIndex(name, config), deleteIndex(name)

Create packages/search/src/engines/in-memory-engine.ts - InMemoryEngine class implementing SearchEngine using the existing BM25Ranker from core/bm25-ranker.ts for ranking, with in-memory document storage

Create packages/search/src/engines/meilisearch-engine.ts - MeilisearchEngine class implementing SearchEngine, wrapping the MeiliSearch SDK (already a dependency), with proper error handling and graceful fallback logging when Meilisearch is unavailable

Create packages/search/src/engines/index.ts - factory function createSearchEngine() that checks MEILISEARCH_URL env var. If set, returns MeilisearchEngine. Otherwise returns InMemoryEngine. Export the SearchEngine interface and both engines.
Update packages/search/src/index.ts to re-export from engines/index.ts (createSearchEngine, SearchEngine, MeilisearchEngine, InMemoryEngine)
Add Meilisearch service to docker-compose.yml (getmeili/meilisearch:latest, port 7700, MEILI_MASTER_KEY env var, volume for data, healthcheck, on quant-network)
Add MEILISEARCH_URL and MEILISEARCH_KEY env vars to quantmail, quantchat, and admin services in docker-compose.yml
acceptance_criteria: packages/search/src/engines/meilisearch-engine.ts implements SearchEngine with graceful fallback on connection failure
docker-compose.yml includes meilisearch service on quant-network
pnpm turbo test passes (new unit tests pass)
